creator: kappa@rambler-co.ru
text:
Actuall, Pav incorporated my followup right into the PR. So it was just sitting there 
waiting for some spare time from a committer.

miwi@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] Fixes to security/p5-Net-OpenID-Server
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Sat Nov 29 21:58:27 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Feedback timeout. If you want to update this port, please feel free to
> follow-up this PR so that we can re-open it and find a solution for the
> problem. Thanks!
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=129016
